pi_items.source: Code verification: setup_task.sh line 15 (ROOM_URL="http://localhost:8080/SecurityMeeting"); also confirmed in task.json description
Code verification: setup_task.sh lines 9 and 15; docker-compose.yml port mapping 8080:80; setup_jitsi.sh line 84

privileged_info_summary: The toggle_lobby task uses Jitsi Meet version stable-9753 (verified via official docker hub: jitsi/web:stable-9753, jitsi/prosody:stable-9753, jitsi/jicofo:stable-9753, jitsi/jvb:stable-9753). The meeting room is named "SecurityMeeting" and runs on localhost:8080. The Jitsi server is configured with ENABLE_LOBBY=1 in both the prosody and jicofo services, meaning the lobby feature is enabled server-side and can be toggled by the user via the Security menu.
